name: components/popover
description: A floating container that appears next to a trigger element, supporting richer content than a tooltip. Provides a complete composition system with Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent, and PopoverPortal. Supports configurable gutter spacing, multiple placement directions, and entrance/exit animations (fade + zoom + slide). Built on Kobalte Popover with full ARIA popover semantics and focus management, ideal for forms, pickers, and detailed info panels.
useCases: Inline date or color pickers that open from an input trigger without leaving the page
User-info cards that appear when hovering or clicking an avatar in a comment thread
Filter panels with multiple checkboxes and inputs that float above a table toolbar
Confirmation mini-forms such as 'Rename' or 'Add tag' triggered from list-item menus
usage: import { Popover, PopoverTrigger, PopoverContent, PopoverPortal } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/popover"
